description: The threshold σ > 0.277 comes from the Bourgain-Kontorovich circle method framework with specific assumptions about exponential sum bounds. This dependency must be stated explicitly so readers understand the threshold is not absolute.
action_taken: The threshold σ > 0.277 comes from the Bourgain-Kontorovich circle method framework with specific assumptions about exponential sum bounds. This dependency must be stated explicitly so readers understand the threshold is not absolute.
